title: 30 Q Posters finally released Troll by 2ch
display_title: 30 Q Posters finally released Troll by 2ch
wikitext:
[]: 3.0/Q Posters finally released?? (Troll by 2ch) Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 27, 2012 12:27 pm Found these on Tumblr which link back to here (Control + F for "いわかんねーな" on the Japanese page--which roughly translates to "Uncomfortable feeling". ) No idea if the posters are legit, BUT The first two posters say the line "There's always hope, no matter what" which was included in that 3.0 piano trailer. The third poster says (roughly) "Because you're alive". Thoughts? If these are legit, I guess those "keywords" posters will be released later? And Khara really doesn't want us to know anything about this movie, huh? Good way to keep folks in suspense!

[]: Post by Murmur » Mon Aug 27, 2012 12:36 pm They don't look like drawing at all. They look like pictures. Granted, in all cases, it's a damn good-looking sky, but I'm unsure of what the hidden message is (the fact that I don't speak Japanese may be playing). Unless it's something like "you're all drooling and sweating in anticipation, right? Keep waiting."

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Aug 27, 2012 12:43 pm Murmur wrote: They don't look like drawing at all. They look like pictures. Granted, in all cases, it's a damn good-looking sky, but I'm unsure of what the hidden message is (the fact that I don't speak Japanese may be playing). Unless it's something like "you're all drooling and sweating in anticipation, right? Keep waiting."

[]: Post by Murmur » Mon Aug 27, 2012 12:50 pm So the hidden message is "even if everything is destroyed, if NERV's manpower is under arrest, if Gendou and Fuyutsuki are running away, if Asuka lost an eye, if Shinji is frozen and Kaoru up to something probably dangerous, there's still hope as long as you live". I'm still not quite sure that's absolutely 100% positive...

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Aug 27, 2012 1:03 pm Murmur wrote: I'm still not quite sure that's absolutely 100% positive...

[]: Post by 1731298478 » Mon Aug 27, 2012 1:16 pm They're very cool, but it looks like they were posted in a thread in 2ch where people were creating fake Q posters. ( http://logsoku.com/thread/hayabusa.2ch.net/news4vip/1345976182/ .. title is "let's make fake Eva Q posters and troll Eva fans" ........ ) The original images appear there: http://beebee2see.appspot.com.nyud.net/d/agpiZWViZWUyc2VlchULEgxJbWFnZUFuZFRleHQYt9r5Bgw.jpg http://beebee2see.appspot.com.nyud.net/d/agpiZWViZWUyc2VlchULEgxJbWFnZUFuZFRleHQYttr5Bgw.jpg http://beebee2see.appspot.com.nyud.net/d/agpiZWViZWUyc2VlchULEgxJbWFnZUFuZFRleHQYyNL5Bgw.jpg Here's an image of one of the posters with a different quote: http://beebee2see.appspot.com.nyud.net/d/agpiZWViZWUyc2VlchULEgxJbWFnZUFuZFRleHQYvLj6Bgw.jpg "It's been a long time, Shinji-kun." Also this poster: http://beebee2see.appspot.com.nyud.net/d/agpiZWViZWUyc2VlchULEgxJbWFnZUFuZFRleHQY2Pn5Bgw.jpg Quote: "Why are you so depressed? Baka Shinji." And this one... http://www.dotup.org/uploda/www.dotup.org3354254.jpg Note written on poster: "It looks like a face" ...

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 27, 2012 1:19 pm Darn. I wonder how that Yaraon blog ended up linking to those three posters, I thought they were a creditable site. Thanks for the headsup, Number-kun!

[]: Post by Rj123541 » Mon Aug 27, 2012 1:38 pm If they are real i want them they look really nice.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 27, 2012 3:09 pm Welp, might as well lock this thread up since these posters weren't the real thing. I was impressed by the troll job at any rate. It's the end of August so I'm sure there will be an outpouring of Q/3.0 news in the next 2 months.
